introSection: Jungle Mouse was a steel wild mouse roller coaster previously located at Everland in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, South Korea. The ride was located where the Magic Cookie House is now. The ride closed around 1988.
fullText: Jungle Mouse was a steel wild mouse roller coaster previously located at Everland in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, South Korea. The ride was located where the Magic Cookie House is now. The ride closed around 1988.
